Description: Deliver teammate-level performance analytics and staffing visibility for live chat operations.
Detect low-quality bot outcomes and generate actionable conversation-quality insights.
Provide stable export/reporting APIs and scheduled delivery for enterprise analytics consumption.

Summary: Teammate FRT P50 and P95 dashboard
Description: As support lead I can view teammate first-response-time distributions by shift and date range. AC: dashboard shows P50 and P95 by teammate with filters for bot and period.

Summary: Teammate workload and handled session metrics
Description: As operations manager I can monitor sessions handled and active workload per teammate. AC: workload panel shows handled sessions, open queue ownership, and trend over time.

Summary: Coverage timeline and staffing gap visualization
Description: As workforce planner I can identify chat coverage gaps. AC: hourly availability vs demand chart highlights under-covered intervals.
As QA lead I can compare CSAT by teammate and handling mode. AC: CSAT is segmented by automated, assisted, and manual resolutions.
As quality manager I can see top unresolved reasons grouped by intent. AC: unresolved clusters are generated from conversation lifecycle and user message patterns.
As QA analyst I can detect weak bot answers at scale. AC: conversations are flagged when fallback/low-confidence patterns are present and surfaced in reports.
As operations owner I receive alerts when transfer rates spike abnormally. AC: alert rule compares rolling baseline vs current window and triggers notifications.
As support lead I get actionable coaching suggestions from repeated failure patterns. AC: top suggestions include issue type, sample conversations, and expected impact.
As admin I can schedule daily or weekly analytics snapshots to email destinations. AC: scheduler supports timezone, report type, and delivery history with failure logs.
As data engineer I can retrieve analytics with a versioned schema and pagination. AC: API supports date range, filters, pagination, and schema version metadata.
As analyst I can inspect metric definitions and formulas used in dashboards. AC: endpoint returns metric name, description, formula, version, and last update date.

Summary: Enterprise export jobs and audit trail
Description: As enterprise customer I can run asynchronous export jobs and audit downloads. AC: export jobs are tracked with status, requester, filters, and downloadable artifact links.
